_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=second exact-integer witness with a DIFFERENT self-pump and signal, showing the self-pumped output is pump-independent. -->
primary_source: (Feinberg, 1982) DOI 10.1364/OL.7.000486; (Cronin-Golomb et al., 1984) DOI 10.1109/JQE.1984.1072018. Distinct self-pump p=13, signal s=20 -> qa_neg(20)=4; same-medium recovery 4, confirming pump-independence.
